data.body: BUG-FIX 751 regression-safety check GREEN (early-land clearance for non-integration tier): full CI-equivalent suite 6261 passed, only the same 3 machine-env config failures (test_config_perf/show — this host's ~/.config/rebar; CI clean env unaffected). Combined with RED-first + 4 targeted regression tests + lint/typecheck clean + independence (own worktree/tmp-fixture/single commit on clean main), the fix is validated. Awaiting 751 Gerrit CI (Verified) to submit+land, then rebase stack + live eval + close.
